name: odoo_store_manager
description: Seamlessly manage your Odoo store directly from OpenClaw. Query sales, check stock, and update inventory using Natural Language.
author: OpenClaw Community

env.name: ODOO_URL
env.description: The full URL of your Odoo instance (e.g., https://my-store.odoo.com)

env.name: ODOO_DB
env.description: The name of your Odoo database

env.name: ODOO_USER
env.description: Your Odoo login email or username

env.name: ODOO_PASSWORD
env.description: Your Odoo password or API key

env.name: ODOO_BOT_ID
env.description: The Partner ID of the Odoo user that OpenClaw will use to reply in Odoo Discuss
